benchmark_tasks.description: Confirm the deterministic AutoResearch loop emits graded readiness artifacts.
Grade bounded ML-loop metric improvement, budget compliance, and offline execution.

claim_boundary: Benchmark-adjacent statistics describe the deterministic bundled fixture only; they are readiness diagnostics, not broad empirical or publication claims.
non_claims: not evidence of empirical superiority outside the bundled fixture
not a network or LLM-evidence claim

statistical_methods.name: Wilson score accuracy intervals
statistical_methods.scope: baseline and evaluated candidates on the bundled offline fixture

statistical_methods.name: deterministic bootstrap intervals
statistical_methods.scope: accepted-candidate accuracy and macro-F1 uncertainty on the bundled offline fixture

statistical_methods.name: exact McNemar paired comparison
statistical_methods.scope: matched baseline-vs-accepted correctness on the local test split

statistical_methods.name: bootstrap rank-stability frequencies
statistical_methods.scope: candidate ordering stability within the configured candidate budget
